# History & Geopolitics

A personal library of plain-English history and geopolitics pieces.

Website: https://history-geopolitics.netlify.app/

## Adding new content

1. Drop a new `.html` file in this folder.
2. Add these optional `<meta>` tags inside its `<head>` so it lands in the right place:
   ```html
   <meta name="category"        content="Middle East">
   <meta name="subcategory"     content="Israel & Palestine">
   <meta name="nav-title"       content="Short title for the sidebar">
   <meta name="nav-description" content="One-line summary.">
   <meta name="nav-added"       content="2026-04-18">
   ```
   (If you can't edit the file, add an entry for it in [_overrides.json](_overrides.json) instead.)
3. Run `python3 regenerate.py`. That rewrites both [index.html](index.html)'s sidebar manifest and the library list above.

## Running locally

[index.html](index.html) is the library hub. Some browsers block iframes when opening files directly, so serve the folder over a local server:

```
python3 -m http.server 8000
```

Then open http://localhost:8000.
